about.title: About EduTrust
about.subtitle: Revolutionizing certificate verification with AI-powered technology
about.missionText: To eliminate fake and forged degree misuse in jobs, admissions, and government schemes through advanced AI-powered verification.
about.missionDescription: EduTrust leverages cutting-edge AI technology, OCR capabilities, and blockchain security to provide instant, accurate verification of academic certificates. Our platform serves universities, employers, and government agencies across India.
about.teamSubtitle: Built by Team COSMOS for Smart India Hackathon 2025
about.teamDescription: We are a passionate team of developers, AI researchers, and cybersecurity experts committed to solving the critical problem of certificate fraud in India's education system.
about.teamMission: Our solution combines cutting-edge technology with practical usability to serve universities, employers, and students across the nation.

secure.title: Secure & Reliable
secure.description: Bank-grade security with blockchain verification ensuring tamper-proof certificates

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.description: Verify certificates in seconds, not days or weeks

multilang.title: Multi-Language Support
multilang.description: OCR support for 10+ Indian regional languages

trusted.title: Trusted by Thousands
trusted.description: Used by 500+ universities and educational institutions

step1.title: Upload & Extract
step1.description: Upload certificate image or PDF. Our multi-language OCR extracts text from documents in Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, and 6+ other Indian languages.

step2.title: AI Analysis
step2.description: Advanced AI algorithms analyze fonts, seals, signatures, and document structure. Detect tampering and anomalies with 99.8% accuracy.

step3.title: Blockchain Verification
step3.description: Cross-reference with university databases and blockchain records. Provide instant, tamper-proof verification results.
